titleStmt.title: SII 26.726: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 726. (A.R. No. 675 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kōnērimaikoṇḍāṉ, (Parakēsari Kulōttuṅga III): C. 12th century.

summary.p: It records a gift of land, 10-1/4 plus 3/8 mā in extent to provide for daily worship and offerings to the god Mahādēvar of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam in Vaḍakavināḍu in Pāṇḍikuḷāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu, by the king and it is stated that this gift was made in accordance with the order of Parakēsaripaṟumar Viśayālayaśōḻadēvar directing the grant of a tax-free dēvadāṉa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ÷ kopparakesaripaṟmarāṉa śrī ÷ vicayālayacoḻadevar tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭaruḷiṉa tirumukattiṉpaṭi § svastiśrī ÷ tribhuvanaccakravatti koṉerimaikoṇṭāṉ pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakavināṭṭu tiruneṭuṅkaḷattu mahādevar koyil tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇiceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkaāriyañceyvāṉukkum Ittevarkku Aviccaṉai nitta nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭa kiḷiyūr nā
ṭṭu paṇaikkuṭiyil nilam pattekālekāṇi Araikkāṇi Iṉnilam kal kaikkoṇṭu ni celuttuka Eḻutināṉ tirumantiraolai Irācanārāyaṇaveḷāṉ Ivai kaḷappāḷarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai viḻiñattarayaṉeḻuttu Ivai vāṇātarāyaṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.726 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
